section.heading: Annual report on force structure changes exhibit for the defense budget

subsection.heading: Annual Report.—
subsection.content: Not later than 10 days after the date on which the budget of the President for a fiscal year is submitted to Congress pursuant to section 1105 of title 31, the Secretary of Defense shall submit to the congressional defense committees a report on any major weapon systems proposed to be divested, re-prioritized, or retired in such budget.

subsection.heading: Contents.—
subsection.chapeau: Each report under subsection (a) shall include the following:

paragraph.content: Identification of each major weapon system the Secretary of Defense proposes to divest, re-prioritize, or retire in the period of five fiscal years following the date of the report.
Budget line-item details related to each major weapon system identified under paragraph (1).

paragraph.chapeau: For each proposed divestment, re-prioritization, or retirement, an explanation of—

subparagraph.content: the timeline for the divestment, re-prioritization, or retirement, including any factors that may affect such timelines positively or negatively;
any cost savings associated with the divestment, re-prioritization, or retirement;

the rationale for the divestment, re-prioritization, or retirement, including a qualitative description of the risk associated with the divestment, re-prioritization, or retirement based on the most recent National Defense Strategy (as of the date of the report);
any critical dependencies with other program efforts that might affect the timeline for such divestment, reprioritization, or retirement;
the expected disposition of the weapon system after divestment, re-prioritization or retirement; and

identification of the system or systems that are expected to satisfy the military requirements that were fulfilled by the weapon system once the divestment, re-prioritization, or retirement of that weapon system is completed.

subsection.heading: Relationship to Other Reports.—
subsection.content: The Secretary of Defense shall ensure that the report required under subsection (a) is deconflicted with the report required under section 222e of this title.

subsection.heading: Major Weapon System Defined.—
subsection.content: In this section, the term “major weapon system” has the meaning given that term in section 101(a) of this title.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 118–31, div. A, title I, § 151, Dec. 22, 2023, 137 Stat. 179; amended Pub. L. 119–60, div. A, title VIII, § 811(c)(2)(B), Dec. 18, 2025, 139 Stat. 950.)
